# unifi_network (Resource)

Manage a UniFi network using the current integration API network model.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Manage a gateway-managed network on a UniFi site.
data "unifi_site" "main" {
  name = "Default"
}

resource "unifi_network" "trusted" {
  site_id                 = data.unifi_site.main.id
  management              = "GATEWAY"
  name                    = "trusted"
  enabled                 = true
  vlan_id                 = 20
  isolation_enabled       = false
  cellular_backup_enabled = false
  internet_access_enabled = true
  mdns_forwarding_enabled = true

  ipv4_configuration = {
    auto_scale_enabled = false
    host_ip_address    = "10.20.0.1"
    prefix_length      = 24

    dhcp_configuration = {
      mode                            = "SERVER"
      start_ip_address                = "10.20.0.100"
      end_ip_address                  = "10.20.0.240"
      lease_time_seconds              = 86400
      dns_server_ip_addresses         = ["10.20.0.10", "1.1.1.1"]
      ping_conflict_detection_enabled = false
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `management` (String) Network management mode. Supported values: `UNMANAGED`, `GATEWAY`, `SWITCH`.
- `name` (String)
- `site_id` (String)
- `vlan_id` (Number)

### Optional

- `cellular_backup_enabled` (Boolean)
- `device_id` (String)
- `dhcp_guarding` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dhcp_guarding))
- `internet_access_enabled` (Boolean)
- `ipv4_configuration` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ipv4_configuration))
- `isolation_enabled` (Boolean)
- `mdns_forwarding_enabled` (Boolean)
- `zone_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `default` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--dhcp_guarding"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dhcp_guarding`

Required:

- `trusted_dhcp_server_ip_addresses` (Set of String)


<a id="nestedatt--ipv4_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ipv4_configuration`

Required:

- `auto_scale_enabled` (Boolean)
- `host_ip_address` (String)
- `prefix_length` (Number)

Optional:

- `additional_host_ip_subnets` (Set of String)
- `dhcp_configuration` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ipv4_configuration--dhcp_configuration))

<a id="nestedatt--ipv4_configuration--dhcp_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ipv4_configuration.dhcp_configuration`

Required:

- `mode` (String)

Optional:

- `dhcp_server_ip_addresses` (Set of String)
- `dns_server_ip_addresses` (Set of String)
- `domain_name` (String)
- `end_ip_address` (String)
- `gateway_ip_address_override` (String)
- `lease_time_seconds` (Number)
- `ping_conflict_detection_enabled` (Boolean)
- `start_ip_address` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import a site-scoped network by site and network identifier.
terraform import unifi_network.trusted <site_id>/<network_id>
```
